chosen_action.title: Hide already-delivered primary-repo-flat manual packet and non-runtime-sendable publisher targets from do-now guidance

why_this_action.summary: The latest board still advertised the primary-repo-flat publisher packet as "Do now" even though the packet had already been manually delivered in the current review window, and the only remaining untouched publisher target (ctxt.dev / Signum) is not runtime-sendable here.

expected_outcome: Future measurement-hold runs stop nudging the loop back toward fake progress on the already-delivered primary-repo-flat packet and instead expose the real blocker stack truthfully.

measurement_window.success_metric: marketing_execution_board_latest.md no longer surfaces a do-now primary-repo-flat packet while the current manual-delivery window is active or only non-runtime-sendable publisher targets remain.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the board re-surfaces the packet without a fresh sendable target set or after another same-window manual delivery, patch the selector/executor truthfulness layer again instead of refreshing the packet.
